commands.narrative:
**Roster:** No changes since yesterday — added: none, removed: none, toggled: none.

**Headline:** v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp has crossed n=100 with drop_top3=−0.503 SOL, triggering the kill criterion set in yesterday's watch. v25-bot-excl-climbing continues to hold all 6 promotion gates (n=248, drop3=+1.622 SOL, total=+3.506 SOL, monthly=10.66 SOL/mo, Panel 11 STABLE, Panel 7 NOT OVERFIT) and remains the primary promote candidate — though the DECAYING edge flag warrants live monitoring.

**Today's P&L:** 0 trades captured so far (report generated early; pipeline_health shows 825s since last graduation). Yesterday delivered 391 trades across 86 strategies. The aggregate daily net is dominated by the sheer breadth of the roster (86 strategies, most still in the n<50 data-gathering phase) — don't read yesterday's aggregate as a structural signal.

**v25-bot-excl-climbing (score=85, DECAYING):** Composite score stabilized at 85 for 2 consecutive days after falling from a peak of 100 on 2026-05-21. All 4 SOL-bar gates clear: n=248≥100 ✓, drop3=+1.622>0 ✓, total=+3.506≥0.5 ✓, monthly=10.66≥3.75 ✓. Panel 11 analog (age>10min + mono>0.5) is STABLE at wr_std_dev=2.3%; Panel 7 verdict is NOT OVERFIT (DEGRADED, not OVERFIT). The DECAYING edge flag reflects the recent-30 median falling to −11.37% vs the all-time median of −5.32% — but CLAUDE.md explicitly warns not to kill a fat-tail strategy on negative median alone. Leave-one-out drop_top3=+1.622 SOL is the outlier check that matters, and it's strongly positive. Recommendation: promote to live is the right call — score is 85, all gates pass, and yesterday's 16 trades added +0.367 SOL. Operator decision required.

**v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp (score=35, DECAYING, KILL CRITERION HIT):** Yesterday's action item (ai-2026-05-23-002) set the kill criterion at "n≥100 and drop_top3≤0." As of today, n=109 and drop_top3=−0.503 SOL — both conditions met. The strategy's composite score has also declined: 48.6 → 48.4 → 35.0 over the last 3 days. The 1-second polling variant of v25 is collecting more trades than the shadow (25 trades/day vs 109 lifetime already) but is failing to replicate the shadow's outlier-stripped edge. Recommend killing this strategy — the hypothesis that 1s polling enhances v25's edge is falsified at n=109.

**v10-best-double (score=65.4, DECAYING):** Three consecutive days of score decline: 87.8 → 71.2 → 65.4. Yesterday: 7 trades, −0.780 SOL. The monthly run rate has slipped to 3.35 SOL/mo (gate threshold: 3.75). The strategy now fails the monthly bar gate. It technically passes drop3>0 (+0.051 SOL, barely) but the edge is thin and declining. Panel 11 shows "vel 20-50 + dd>-10%" is STABLE (wr_std_dev=6.6%) but the recent-30 window median is −29.31% vs all-time −18.24% — a large regime shift. This is not yet INVALID (n=119, drop3=+0.051>0) but is approaching it. Recommend watching closely: if drop3 turns negative or monthly falls below 2 SOL/mo, move to kill.

**Emerging candidates (WATCH):** v9shadow-velmono-dev (score=81.5, STABLE, n=47, d3=+1.718, monthly=+4.47) is the strongest sub-100 strategy by outlier-robustness — drop3=+1.718 SOL is 2.5× its base, suggesting the edge is NOT concentrated in 1-3 winners. v9shadow-vel20-top5 (score=78.7, STABLE, n=70, d3=+0.684, monthly=+4.77) is pacing toward n=100 and passing all gates except sample size.

**Cross-day anomalies:** 7 strategies flagged DECAYING in today's anomaly scan — v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono (recent-30 median −30.78%), v12-vel2050-liq-dd15 (−35.48%), v10-best-double (−29.31%), v20-vel2050-dd-base (−33.76%), v20-vel2050-dd-tight (−35.57%), v25-bot-excl-climbing (−11.37%), and v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp (−10.72%). The vel 20-50 + dd>-10% regime may be weakening — all three v20 variants plus v10 are in decay. v25's decay is milder and its drop3 remains strongly positive, distinguishing it from the rest of this cluster.

**Live sell failures:** Two sell-failure events logged at 07:33–07:34 UTC. The circuit breaker did not trip and live-mode prerequisites remain satisfied. Monitor for recurrence — repeated sell failures during a live position can cause missed exits and outsized losses.

**Operator next step:** (1) Decide on v25 promotion — all 6 gates pass, score=85, journal=ON-TRACK. Push a strategy-commands.json `upsert` to move it to live if desired. (2) Kill v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp — kill criterion triggered, push a `delete` or `toggle enabled:false` command.

anomalies.detail: v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp: n=109 ≥ 100 and drop_top3=−0.503 ≤ 0. Kill criterion from ai-2026-05-23-002 is met — recommend killing this strategy.
v10-best-double: score declining (87.8→71.2→65.4); monthly_run_rate now 3.35 SOL/mo, below 3.75 bar.
v20-vel2050-dd-base: DECAYING, recent-30 median −33.76%. Vel 20-50 + dd>-10% regime weakening across v10, v20 variants.
v25-bot-excl-climbing: DECAYING (recent-30 median −11.37% vs −5.32%), but drop_top3=+1.622 SOL remains strongly positive — median decay does not override leave-one-out result.
Two 'Live sell failed to land' errors at 07:33–07:34 UTC. Circuit breaker not tripped. Monitor for recurrence.

patterns.detail: v25-bot-excl-climbing: composite score 100→85→85 over 3 days. Stable but below peak; DECAYING median flag warrants post-promotion monitoring.
v10-best-double: composite score 87.8→71.2→65.4 over 3 days — consistent decline. Monthly gate now failing (3.35 < 3.75 SOL/mo).
v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp: composite score 48.6→48.4→35.0 over 3 days — declining. Kill criterion triggered at n=109.
v10-best-double + v20-vel2050-dd-base + v20-vel2050-dd-tight all flagged DECAYING simultaneously. Vel 20-50 + dd>-10% filter combination appears to be in a weak regime.

All 1s-polling mirrors (v28-best-double-1s-ttp, v28-velmono-dev-1s-ttp, v28-velmid-liq-mono-1s-ttp, v28-vel2050-dd-base-1s-ttp) show negative drop_top3. Only v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp got above-water on total but now fails drop3 gate at n=109. The 1s-poll hypothesis is not replicating parent strategies' edges.

promote.reason: All 6 promotion gates clear: n=248≥100 ✓, drop_top3=+1.622 SOL>0 ✓, total=+3.506 SOL≥0.5 ✓, monthly=10.66 SOL/mo≥3.75 ✓, Panel 11 analog STABLE (wr_std_dev=2.3%) ✓, Panel 7 NOT OVERFIT ✓. Journal status ON-TRACK. DECAYING edge flag is median-based and does not override the leave-one-out check. Score=85 with all-time high of 100.

kill.reason: n=109 ≥ 100 and drop_top3=−0.503 SOL ≤ 0 — fails outlier-stripped edge gate. Kill criterion from ai-2026-05-23-002 is met. The 1s-poll hypothesis for v25's base is falsified at n=109. Composite score declining: 48.6→48.4→35.0 over last 3 days.

watch.reason: n=47, score=81.5, STABLE. drop_top3=+1.718 SOL is the highest outlier-robustness among sub-100 strategies. Monthly run rate 4.47 SOL/mo pacing well toward the 3.75 bar. Target n=100 in ~25 more days at current rate (2.1 trades/day). Kill if drop_top3 turns negative at n≥50.

n=70, score=78.7, STABLE. Total=+3.734 SOL is the highest lifetime net of any sub-100 strategy. drop_top3=+0.684 SOL (positive but modest — 18% of total). Monthly=4.77 SOL/mo. Pacing toward n=100 in ~10 more days (2.98 trades/day). Key risk: drop3 is modest relative to total, so top-winner concentration deserves attention.

n=119, score=65.4, DECAYING. Monthly gate now failing (3.35 < 3.75 SOL/mo). drop_top3=+0.051 SOL (barely positive). Not yet INVALID but approaching it. Kill criterion: if drop_top3 turns negative or monthly falls below 2.0 SOL/mo, recommend kill.

action_items.summary: Kill v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp — n=109≥100 with drop_top3=−0.503 SOL≤0. Kill criterion from watch item ai-2026-05-23-002 triggered. The 1s-poll hypothesis is falsified.
